title: Thannilavu Theniraikka Lyrics Padithal Mattum Podhuma
stanzas:
Thannilavu Theniraikka
thaalai maram neer thelikka
kanni magal nadai
payindre sendraal
ilam kadhalanai kandu
naani nindraal.
naani nindraal.(2)

nenjam adhil alai ezhumba
thanjamalar adi kalanga
nenjam adhil alai ezhumba
thanjamalar adi kalanga

anji anji idai thuvala vandhaal
angu anbarullam thanai
ninaindhu nindraal
ninaindhu nindraal

minnalandha manam irukka
mannalandha adi edukka
ponnalandha udal
nadunga vandhaal
oru poovalandha
mugaththai kandu nindraal
kandu nindraal

pottiurkka poovirukka
pooththa malar manamirukka
pottiurkka poovirukka
pooththa malar manamirukka

kattilukku miga nerungi
vandhaal
iru kan vizhiyil
kavidhai kandu nindraal
kandu nindraal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the beauty and complexities of love, highlighting feelings of longing and affection.

What is the plot context of the movie?

Padithal Mattum Podhuma revolves around themes of love and relationships, making this song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary P. Susheela, known for her soulful voice and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Thannilavu Theniraikka was composed by Viswanathan Ramamurthy, a prominent figure in Tamil film music.

When was the song released?

The song was released on October 29, 1970.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thannilavu Theniraikka, the lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of love and longing, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt delivery by P. Susheela evoke a sense of nostalgia, transporting listeners to a time of innocent romance. It perfectly encapsulates the essence of the film Padithal Mattum Podhuma, where love takes center stage. This classic track remains a cherished favorite for those who appreciate the depth of old Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thannilavu Theniraikka from Padithal Mattum Podhuma is a timeless classic that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With P. Susheela's enchanting vocals and Kannadasan's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the sweetness of romance. The melodic composition by Viswanathan Ramamurthy adds a nostalgic touch, making it a must-listen for fans of old Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: To shine brightly, the tree needs water.
To shine brightly, the tree needs water. If a young girl walks gracefully, she will find a young lover. If she finds him, she finds him.
In the heart, waves rise like a flower's petals, making the heart tremble.
If someone comes near, they will think of their loved ones and stay, stay.
To shine brightly, the tree needs water.
If a bright mind exists, and a strong foundation is needed, if a beautiful body walks by, one will notice a lovely face, notice it.
To shine brightly, the tree needs water.
If flowers bloom, they will have fragrance. If flowers bloom, they will have fragrance.
If you come close to the bed, you will see poetry in both eyes, see it, see it.
To shine brightly, the tree needs water.
